scripts.predev: powershell -Command "$p5000 = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($p5000) { Stop-Process -Id $p5000.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; $p3000 = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($p3000) { Stop-Process -Id $p3000.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Path -like '*production-coding-harness*' } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue"
